Caller must be owner.","params":{"amount":"Amount in USDC base units (6 decimals). e.g. 100 USDC = 100_000_000"}},"pauseContract()":{"details":"Caller must be the contract owner."},"setServerOperator(address)":{"details":"Caller must be the contract owner.","params":{"newOperator":"Address that will become the new server operator."}},"unpauseContract()":{"details":"Caller must be the contract owner."},"withdrawEth(address,uint256)":{"details":"Caller must be the contract owner.","params":{"amount":"Amount in wei.","to":"Recipient address."}},"withdrawHouseProfits(uint256)":{"details":"Caller must be the contract owner.","params":{"amount":"Amount in USDC base units (6 decimals)."}}},"title":"AdminAviatorCelo","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{"fundHouse(uint256)":{"notice":"Deposit USDC into the house pool."},"pauseContract()":{"notice":"Pause all game operations (bets, cashouts, snapshots)."},"setServerOperator(address)":{"notice":"Transfer the server-operator role to a new address."},"status()":{"notice":"Print a full status report of the Celo contract (no broadcast)."},"unpauseContract()":{"notice":"Resume game operations after a pause."},"withdrawEth(address,uint256)":{"notice":"Withdraw CELO (native) accidentally sent to the contract."},"withdrawHouseProfits(uint256)":{"notice":"Withdraw USDC profits from the house pool to the owner wallet."}},"notice":"Foundry script for all write operations on the Celo AviatorGame proxy. Proxy address: 0x8b8AD96bdD0897bdaBC9BfdaaA93d610A1eA5783 Usage (run from repo root):   # Set server operator   forge script contracts/script/AdminAviatorCelo.s.sol:AdminAviatorCelo \\     --sig \"setServerOperator(address)\" <NEW_OPERATOR_ADDRESS> \\     --rpc-url $MAINNET_URL --broadcast   # Fund the house (approve + deposit USDC)   forge script contracts/script/AdminAviatorCelo.s.sol:AdminAviatorCelo \\     --sig \"fundHouse(uint256)\" <AMOUNT_IN_USDC_6_DECIMALS> \\     --rpc-url $MAINNET_URL --broadcast   # Withdraw house profits   forge script contracts/script/AdminAviatorCelo.s.sol:AdminAviatorCelo \\     --sig \"withdrawHouseProfits(uint256)\" <AMOUNT_IN_USDC_6_DECIMALS> \\     --rpc-url $MAINNET_URL --broadcast   # Pause the contract   forge script contracts/script/AdminAviatorCelo.s.sol:AdminAviatorCelo \\     --sig \"pauseContract()\" \\     --rpc-url $MAINNET_URL --broadcast   # Unpause the contract   forge script contracts/script/AdminAviatorCelo.s.sol:AdminAviatorCelo \\     --sig \"unpauseContract()\" \\     --rpc-url $MAINNET_URL --broadcast   # Withdraw ETH accidentally sent to the contract   forge script contracts/script/AdminAviatorCelo.s.sol:AdminAviatorCelo \\     --sig \"withdrawEth(address,uint256)\" <RECIPIENT> <AMOUNT_WEI> \\     --rpc-url $MAINNET_URL --broadcast   # Print current contract status (read-only, no --broadcast needed)   forge script contracts/script/AdminAviatorCelo.s.sol:AdminAviatorCelo \\     --sig \"status()\" \\     --rpc-url $MAINNET_URL All functions read PRIVATE_KEY from the environment (.env or shell fundHouse(uint256).details: Approves the proxy then calls fundHouse. Caller must be owner.

params.amount: Amount in USDC base units (6 decimals). e.g. 100 USDC = 100_000_000

pauseContract().details: Caller must be the contract owner.

setServerOperator(address).details: Caller must be the contract owner.

params.newOperator: Address that will become the new server operator.

unpauseContract().details: Caller must be the contract owner.

withdrawEth(address,uint256).details: Caller must be the contract owner.

withdrawHouseProfits(uint256).details: Caller must be the contract owner.

params.amount: Amount in USDC base units (6 decimals).

fundHouse(uint256).notice: Deposit USDC into the house pool.

pauseContract().notice: Pause all game operations (bets, cashouts, snapshots).

setServerOperator(address).notice: Transfer the server-operator role to a new address.

status().notice: Print a full status report of the Celo contract (no broadcast).

unpauseContract().notice: Resume game operations after a pause.

withdrawEth(address,uint256).notice: Withdraw CELO (native) accidentally sent to the contract.

withdrawHouseProfits(uint256).notice: Withdraw USDC profits from the house pool to the owner wallet.
